message:
Restore changelog index stub for CI builds

Re-add index.mdx stub that allows builds to succeed without running
sync:changelog. Update .gitignore to preserve this file while still
ignoring generated changelog content.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ node_modules/
 # Changelog sync (generated content)
 .news/
 src/content/docs/changelog/*
-!src/content/docs/changelog/timeline.mdx
+!src/content/docs/changelog/index.mdx
 src/sidebar-changelog.generated.ts
 src/unified-timeline-data.generated.ts

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+---
+title: Changelog
+---
+
+The changelog is populated during CI builds. Run `pnpm sync:changelog` locally
+to fetch release notes from the [tenzir/news](https://github.com/tenzir/news)
+repository.
